# HeartCited Embed Widget

> Evidence-based health research. Embeddable widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/heartcited-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>
<div data-heartcited="evidence" data-slug="example"></div>
```

## Available Widget Types (7)

- evidence: `data-heartcited="evidence"`
- ingredient: `data-heartcited="ingredient"`
- condition: `data-heartcited="condition"`
- paper: `data-heartcited="paper"`
- figure: `data-heartcited="figure"`
- search: `data-heartcited="search"`
- safety: `data-heartcited="safety"`

## Customization

- **Themes**: light, dark, sepia, auto (follows system preference)
- **Sizes**: compact (280px), default (420px), large (720px)
- **Styles**: modern, classic

```html
<div data-heartcited="evidence" data-slug="example"
     data-theme="auto" data-size="compact" data-style-variant="modern"></div>
```

## Integration Methods

1. **Script tag** (recommended): `<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/heartcited-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>`
2. **iframe**: `https://heartcited.com/iframe/entity/{slug}/`
3. **oEmbed**: `https://heartcited.com/oembed?url={page_url}&format=json`
4. **Badge**: `https://heartcited.com/badge/site.svg`

## Links

- Main site: https://heartcited.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.heartcited.com
- API documentation: https://heartcited.com/developers/
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/heartcited-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/heartcited-embed

- [CitedHealth Widget](https://widget.citedhealth.com)
- [HairCited Widget](https://widget.haircited.com)
- [SleepCited Widget](https://widget.sleepcited.com)
- [GutCited Widget](https://widget.gutcited.com)
- [ImmuneCited Widget](https://widget.immunecited.com)
- [BrainCited Widget](https://widget.braincited.com)
- [WeightCited Widget](https://widget.weightcited.com)
- [SkinCited Widget](https://widget.skincited.com)
